use_cases: Website header navigation with dropdown submenus for category browsing
Dashboard navigation menus with expandable sections
Product navigation with mega-menu style dropdowns
Tab-based navigation with state-driven content switching
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based navigation menu component with dropdown functionality, hover states, and keyboard accessibility. Built with Tailwind CSS using the class-variance-authority pattern for consistent styling across menu states. Features expandable triggers, list-based navigation items, and viewport container for dropdown positioning. Supports active state styling and smooth transitions for a polished SaaS-style navigation experience.
